title: mentzelia pumila var. multiflora
intro: Mentzelia pumila var. multiflora, also known as the sand corydalis or multiflowered Mentzelia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Loasaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Mentzelia pumila var. multiflora include its ability to reduce pain, promote healing, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
